hero.title: Full Stack Developer
hero.description: I build fast, scalable web apps with React, Node.js and Next.js. From design to deployment.

projectsSection.title: What I've built
projectsSection.subtitle: Real projects — from clients to my own platforms. Each one solves a concrete problem.

skills.title: Technologies
skills.subtitle: Full stack to build and ship modern web products.

aboutCta.p1: I'm Manuel, a Full Stack Developer based in Argentina. I specialize in building modern web applications — from interface design to production deployment.
aboutCta.p2: I work with React, Next.js and Node.js, and I have experience both on real client projects and building my own platforms.
aboutCta.ctaSubtitle: I'm available for freelance projects and full-time roles. Let's talk about how I can help you.

about.p1: Hi, I'm Manuel Hidalgo Castaños, a Full Stack Developer based in Argentina. I specialize in building modern web products — from interface design to production deployment.
about.p2: My main stack is React and Next.js on the frontend, and Node.js + MongoDB on the backend. I have experience working with real clients and building my own platforms.
about.p3: I'm available for freelance projects and full-time opportunities. If you have a project in mind, I'd love to hear about it.

timeline.title: Getting started in programming
timeline.description: I started learning HTML, CSS and JavaScript on my own. I completed the Web Development course at CoderHouse.

timeline.title: Specializing in React
timeline.description: I focused on the React ecosystem: hooks, context, routing. I earned the JavaScript and React certifications at CoderHouse.

timeline.title: First real client
timeline.description: I built the complete website for HyenaFuel, a real sports supplements brand. My first project with a production deployment for a client.

timeline.title: Full Stack & Next.js
timeline.description: I expanded my stack with Node.js, Express and MongoDB. I built my first full-stack platform —a raffles app with authentication and dashboard— and this portfolio.

timeline.title: SaaS platforms and desktop apps
timeline.description: I built HyenaHub, a SaaS platform for trainers with real-time chat, payments and reports (Next.js + Prisma + PostgreSQL + Socket.io), and GymForge, an offline-first desktop gym management system in .NET 9 with Avalonia. I added Prisma, PostgreSQL, Redis and .NET to my stack.

about.ctaSubtitle: I'm available for freelance projects and full-time roles. Get in touch and I'll reply within 24 hours.
